wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Goal Mate project overview section focused on introducing the AI-powered intelligent goal and task management system. Explain its purpose as a Next.js application with CopilotKit integration, core value proposition of natural language AI assistance for personal productivity, and relationship to modern development practices. Document the implementation approach combining AI capabilities with traditional task management features. Include both conceptual overviews for beginners understanding AI productivity tools and technical details for experienced developers evaluating the architecture. Use terminology consistent with the codebase including CopilotKit, AI assistant, and goal management. Provide practical examples demonstrating common use cases like natural language task recommendations and automated report generation. Document the key technologies stack, deployment options, and extensibility points. Include diagrams where appropriate to illustrate the AI-assisted workflow and system architecture.

wiki_catalogs.name: JWT Token Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for JWT token management in the authentication system. Explain the token creation process using jsonwebtoken library, including payload structure with username claims and expiration configuration. Document the token verification mechanism with secret key validation and error handling. Detail the token lifecycle from creation to expiration and renewal strategies. Include practical examples of token signing, verification, and payload extraction. Address security considerations such as secret key management, token storage, and potential vulnerabilities. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common token-related issues like invalid signatures, expired tokens, and malformed payloads.

wiki_catalogs.name: Introduction
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Goal Mate introduction section focused on explaining what Goal Mate is and its core value proposition. Describe it as an AI-powered intelligent goal and task management system built with Next.js and CopilotKit. Explain how the system leverages natural language AI assistance to help users manage their goals, plans, and progress more efficiently. Document the key problem it solves in personal productivity and task management. Include both conceptual overviews for beginners who are new to AI productivity tools and technical highlights for experienced developers evaluating the solution. Use terminology consistent with the codebase including AI assistant, goal management, and CopilotKit integration. Provide practical examples demonstrating common scenarios like natural language task recommendations and automated progress tracking. Document the target audience, use cases, and competitive advantages over traditional task management applications.

wiki_catalogs.name: CopilotKit Runtime Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the CopilotKit runtime configuration section. Explain the CopilotRuntime initialization, adapter setup, and custom OpenAI adapter implementation. Document the runtime configuration options, service adapter selection (OpenAI vs Aliyun Bailian), and model parameter settings. Detail the message cleaning mechanism for developer role replacement and tool call sequence repair. Include practical examples of runtime initialization, adapter configuration, and custom client setup. Document the environment variable requirements (OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_BASE_URL) and error handling strategies. Address model switching between OpenAI and Qwen models, including base URL configuration and authentication setup. Provide guidance on debugging runtime configuration issues and optimizing performance settings.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for authentication endpoints. Document the login endpoint (POST /api/auth/login) including credential validation, JWT token generation, and cookie configuration. Detail the logout endpoint (POST /api/auth/logout) covering token invalidation and session cleanup. Explain the user info endpoint (GET /api/auth/me) for retrieving authenticated user data. Include request/response schemas, authentication headers, error codes, and security considerations. Provide practical examples with curl commands and client implementation code. Address token expiration, refresh mechanisms, and logout scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Entity Models
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the entity models section focused on the core data entities in the Goal-Mate application. Detail each model including Goal, Plan, PlanTagAssociation, ProgressRecord, and Report with their field definitions, data types, constraints, and validation rules. Document the unique identifier patterns (goal_id, plan_id, report_id), timestamp fields (gmt_create, gmt_modified), and optional fields. Explain the purpose and attributes of each entity, their role in the application's data model, and the business logic they represent. Include field-level documentation with data type explanations, default values, and validation constraints. Provide examples of typical data structures for each model and explain how they support the application's core functionality.

wiki_catalogs.name: Core UI Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the core UI component library. Document each component's visual appearance, behavior, and user interaction patterns. Detail props/attributes, variants, sizes, and customization options for Button, Card, Input, Select, Table, Textarea, Slider, Label, and TextPreview components. Include comprehensive usage examples with code snippets showing different variants and configurations. Provide guidelines for responsive design, accessibility compliance, and cross-browser compatibility. Document component states, focus management, and integration patterns. Address form validation, error handling, and user feedback mechanisms. Include style customization options, theming support, and component composition patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Layout System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the layout system section focusing on Next.js app directory structure and layout hierarchy. Explain the root layout implementation, metadata configuration, and viewport settings. Document the main layout component structure, child component rendering patterns, and layout composition strategies. Detail the CopilotKit provider setup within the layout and its impact on AI functionality. Include practical examples of layout customization, responsive design implementation, and performance optimization techniques. Address layout inheritance patterns, conditional rendering, and integration with authentication guards. Provide guidance on layout debugging, common layout issues, and best practices for maintainable layout architecture.

wiki_catalogs.name: Goal Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the goal management system feature. Explain the complete workflow for creating, editing, and deleting goals including the form implementation with tag selection, name validation, and description handling. Document the search and filtering functionality with tag-based filtering and pagination support. Detail the API integration patterns for goal CRUD operations including request/response schemas and error handling. Include practical examples of goal creation scenarios, tag management workflows, and bulk operations. Address the combobox component integration for dynamic tag selection and autocomplete functionality. Provide troubleshooting guides for common form validation issues and performance optimization tips for large goal lists.

wiki_catalogs.name: Task Recommendation Action
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the task recommendation action system. Document the recommendTasks action implementation including parameter validation, filtering logic, and recommendation algorithm. Explain how the action queries uncompleted plans from the database, applies optional filter criteria (difficulty, tags), and sorts results by progress and creation time. Detail the handler implementation showing Prisma client usage, error handling, and response formatting. Include practical examples of recommendation scenarios with sample inputs and outputs. Document the action's integration with the AI system and how it contributes to the overall user experience. Address performance considerations and optimization strategies for large datasets.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the getting started section focused on helping developers quickly set up and run the Goal Mate application. Explain prerequisites including Node.js, Docker, and PostgreSQL requirements. Document the complete installation process from environment configuration to database setup and application launch. Include step-by-step instructions for both local development and Docker deployment approaches. Provide detailed environment variable configuration examples for different AI providers (OpenAI, Aliyun Bailian). Document common setup issues and troubleshooting steps. Include verification steps to ensure proper installation. Make content accessible to beginners while providing sufficient technical depth for experienced developers. Address both development and production deployment scenarios with clear guidance on environment selection.

wiki_catalogs.name: Credential Validation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for credential validation mechanisms in the authentication system. Explain the environment-based credential checking process using AUTH_USERNAME and AUTH_PASSWORD variables. Document the validation algorithm, comparison logic, and security implications of storing credentials in environment variables. Include examples of proper credential setup and common configuration errors. Address security best practices for credential management, including secret rotation and access control. Provide debugging techniques for credential validation failures and integration with external authentication providers.

wiki_catalogs.name: Key Features
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Goal Mate key features section focused on documenting all major functionality and capabilities. Detail the five core feature areas: goal management with tag-based categorization, plan management with difficulty ratings and progress tracking, progress recording with detailed completion evidence, intelligent reporting with automated weekly/monthly reports, and AI assistant with natural language interaction. For each feature, explain the implementation approach, user benefits, and integration patterns. Include practical examples from the actual codebase showing how features work together in the AI-assisted workflow. Document the AI assistant capabilities including intelligent task recommendations, progress queries, goal creation, progress updates, and report generation. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and provide concrete examples demonstrating common use cases and workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: AI Actions System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the AI actions system focused on the custom action handlers and their implementation. Document all AI actions including recommendTasks, queryPlans, createGoal, getSystemOptions, createPlan, findPlan, and updateProgress. Explain the action parameter schemas, handler implementations, and database interactions. Detail the action execution flow, error handling, and response formatting. Include practical examples of each action with sample inputs and outputs. Document the action registration process, parameter validation, and Prisma client usage patterns. Address action-specific business logic such as recommendation algorithms, search functionality, and progress tracking. Provide guidance on extending the action system with custom actions and debugging action execution issues.

wiki_catalogs.name: Goal Management Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for goal management endpoints. Document the GET /api/goal endpoint for listing goals with pagination and tag filtering parameters. Detail the POST /api/goal endpoint for creating new goals including required fields and auto-generated goal_id format. Explain the PUT /api/goal endpoint for updating existing goals with partial updates support. Cover the DELETE /api/goal endpoint for goal removal with proper validation. Include request/response schemas, query parameters, error handling, and practical usage examples. Address goal data validation, uniqueness constraints, and related operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Relationships and Constraints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed content for the relationships and constraints section focused on the database relationships and referential integrity in the Goal-Mate application. Document the foreign key relationships including Plan-PlanTagAssociation (one-to-many), Plan-ProgressRecord (one-to-many), and the self-referencing patterns. Explain the many-to-many relationship implementation through the PlanTagAssociation join table and how it enables flexible tagging of plans. Detail the cascade delete behavior, indexing strategies, and database constraints. Include relationship diagrams showing entity connections, cardinality indicators, and constraint enforcement. Document the unique constraints on identifier fields and explain how relationships support the application's querying patterns and data integrity requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Form Components
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for form-related components and patterns. Detail the Combobox component implementation including search functionality, selection handling, and keyboard navigation. Provide guidelines for form accessibility, validation error display, and submission handling. Address form composition patterns and integration with the overall application state management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Hierarchy
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the component hierarchy section focusing on the component organization and composition patterns. wiki_catalogs.name: Plan Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the plan management system feature. Address query optimization and performance considerations for complex searches.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the authentication system section focused on the JWT-based security implementation. Explain the authentication architecture including credential verification, token generation, and httpOnly cookie management. wiki_catalogs.name: Middleware Protection
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the authentication middleware implementation. wiki_catalogs.name: Technology Stack
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Goal Mate technology stack section focused on documenting all technologies, frameworks, and tools used in the project. Detail the authentication system using JWT with httpOnly cookies. Document the deployment stack including Docker and Docker Compose. For each technology, explain the rationale for selection, version requirements, and integration patterns. Include both high-level architectural decisions and specific implementation details. Provide guidance on extending the system prompt for new capabilities and maintaining prompt consistency across different AI models.

Address validation rules, error handling, and best practices for progress recording.

Address form validation, error handling, and user feedback mechanisms. Include style customization options, theming support, and component composition patterns. Detail the progress tracking system for daily logging and reflection capture. Include the AI chat interface implementation and natural language interaction patterns. Document the report generation system and analytics capabilities. Provide practical examples of feature usage, user workflows, and integration patterns. Include monitoring and logging strategies, backup procedures, and maintenance tasks. Address security hardening, SSL/TLS configuration, and network security. Provide troubleshooting guides for deployment issues, performance optimization, and operational challenges. Include disaster recovery procedures and data backup strategies. Document the CI/CD pipeline integration and automated deployment processes.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# Goal-Mate: AI智能目标管理系统的综合分析

## 项目介绍

Goal-Mate是一个基于AI助手的智能目标管理和计划跟踪系统。该项目旨在帮助用户通过人工智能技术实现更高效的目标达成和学习管理。

### 核心目标
- **智能目标管理**：通过AI助手帮助用户创建、管理和追踪个人目标
- **自动化计划执行**：基于用户的学习和工作习惯，智能推荐和管理具体执行计划
- **智能进展记录**：自动分析用户的完成汇报，智能提取进展内容和思考
- **个性化学习体验**：提供个性化的任务推荐和学习建议

### 目标受众
- 自主学习者和终身学习者
- 需要目标管理工具的专业人士
- 学生和研究人员
- 任何希望提高自我管理效率的人群

## 技术架构

### 整体架构图

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[客户端浏览器] --> B[Next.js应用层]
    B --> C[中间件认证]
    C --> D[API路由层]
    D --> E[Prisma数据库层]
    D --> F[CopilotKit AI引擎]
    F --> G[OpenAI/Qwen模型]
    E --> H[(PostgreSQL数据库)]
    
    subgraph "认证层"
        C1[JWT Token验证]
        C2[Cookie存储]
        C3[会话管理]
    end
    
    subgraph "AI功能层"
        F1[智能任务推荐]
        F2[计划创建]
        F3[进展记录分析]
        F4[书籍推荐]
    end
    
    subgraph "数据层"
        E1[目标管理]
        E2[计划管理]
        E3[进展记录]
        E4[标签系统]
    end
    
    C --> C1
    C --> C2
    C --> C3
    F --> F1
    F --> F2
    F --> F3
    F --> F4
    D --> E1
    D --> E2
    D --> E3
    D --> E4
```

### 核心组件关系

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Auth Middleware] --> B[AuthGuard Component]
    B --> C[Protected Routes]
    C --> D[Main Layout]
    D --> E[AI Chat Interface]
    D --> F[Navigation Menu]
    
    subgraph "AI Services"
        G[CopilotKit Runtime]
        H[OpenAI Adapter]
        I[Custom Actions]
    end
    
    subgraph "Data Models"
        J[Goal Model]
        K[Plan Model]
        L[Progress Record]
        M[Plan Tag Association]
    end
    
    E --> G
    G --> H
    G --> I
    I --> J
    I --> K
    I --> L
    I --> M
```

## 关键实现

### 主要入口点
- **应用根布局** (`src/app/layout.tsx`) - 定义全局样式和CopilotKit集成
- **首页页面** (`src/app/page.tsx`) - 用户仪表板和功能导航
- **认证中间件** (`middleware.ts`) - 全局身份验证和权限控制

### 核心模块

#### 认证系统
- **JWT认证** (`src/lib/auth.ts`) - 实现安全的用户认证机制
- **登录API** (`src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`) - 处理用户登录请求
- **认证守卫** (`src/components/AuthGuard.tsx`) - 客户端路由保护组件

#### AI智能服务
- **CopilotKit集成** (`src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts`) - 核心AI功能实现
- **智能动作系统** - 包含任务推荐、计划创建、进展记录等功能

#### 数据管理
- **数据库模型** (`prisma/schema.prisma`) - 定义目标、计划、进展记录等数据结构
- **Prisma客户端** - 类型安全的数据库访问层

### 配置方法
- **包管理配置** (`package.json`) - 依赖管理和脚本定义
- **构建配置** (`next.config.ts`) - Next.js应用配置
- **中间件配置** (`middleware.ts`) - 请求处理和认证逻辑

### 外部依赖
- **Next.js 15** - React框架和全栈开发平台
- **CopilotKit** - AI助手集成框架
- **Prisma** - 数据库ORM和迁移工具
- **Tailwind CSS** - CSS框架和样式系统
- **OpenAI/Qwen** - 大语言模型集成

### 集成点
- **AI模型集成** - 通过OpenAI适配器连接外部语言模型
- **数据库连接** - PostgreSQL数据库的Prisma客户端
- **前端UI组件** - 基于Radix UI和Tailwind CSS的组件库

## 关键特性

### 功能概览

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> 用户登录
    用户登录 --> 首页仪表板
    首页仪表板 --> 目标管理
    首页仪表板 --> 计划管理
    首页仪表板 --> 进展记录
    首页仪表板 --> AI助手聊天
    
    目标管理 --> 计划创建
    计划创建 --> 进展记录
    进展记录 --> AI分析
    AI分析 --> 智能推荐
    
    用户登录 --> [*]
    智能推荐 --> [*]
```

### 实现亮点

#### 智能AI助手功能
- **自动任务推荐** (`src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts`) - 基于用户状态智能推荐合适任务
- **智能进展分析** - 自动解析用户汇报，提取完成事项和思考内容
- **书籍推荐系统** - 联网搜索并展示书籍信息和阅读建议
- **自然语言处理** - 支持中文自然语言的时间解析和语义理解

#### 数据管理特性
- **标签系统** - 支持多标签分类和智能标签推荐
- **进度跟踪** - 支持周期性任务和一次性任务的不同进度管理
- **数据分析** - 自动生成学习报告和进度统计

#### 用户界面特色
- **响应式设计** - 适配各种设备屏幕尺寸
- **现代化UI** - 基于Tailwind CSS的现代化界面设计
- **交互式组件** - 基于Radix UI的可访问性组件

### 特性架构图

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[用户界面层] --> B[业务逻辑层]
    B --> C[数据访问层]
    C --> D[AI服务层]
    
    subgraph "用户界面层"
        A1[主页仪表板]
        A2[目标管理页面]
        A3[计划管理页面]
        A4[进展记录页面]
        A5[AI聊天界面]
    end
    
    subgraph "业务逻辑层"
        B1[认证服务]
        B2[AI动作处理器]
        B3[数据验证器]
        B4[进度计算器]
    end
    
    subgraph "数据访问层"
        C1[Prisma模型]
        C2[数据库查询]
        C3[缓存管理]
    end
    
    subgraph "AI服务层"
        D1[OpenAI集成]
        D2[Qwen模型适配]
        D3[自然语言处理]
        D4[智能推荐算法]
    end
    
    A --> A1
    A --> A2
    A --> A3
    A --> A4
    A --> A5
    
    A1 --> B1
    A2 --> B2
    A3 --> B2
    A4 --> B4
    A5 --> B2
    
    B1 --> C1
    B2 --> C1
    B4 --> C1
    
    C1 --> D1
    C1 --> D2
    C1 --> D3
    C1 --> D4
```

## 结论和建议

### 项目架构优势
1. **模块化设计** - 清晰的分层架构便于维护和扩展
2. **AI集成深度** - CopilotKit的深度集成提供了丰富的智能功能
3. **数据模型完整** - 完整的目标、计划、进展记录数据模型
4. **用户体验优秀** - 现代化的UI设计和流畅的交互体验

### 潜在改进领域
1. **性能优化** - 可以考虑添加缓存机制和数据库索引优化
2. **安全性增强** - 可以添加更严格的输入验证和SQL注入防护
3. **监控和日志** - 建议添加更完善的错误监控和性能追踪
4. **测试覆盖** - 可以增加单元测试和集成测试覆盖率

### 可行性建议
1. **微服务架构** - 考虑将AI服务独立部署以提高可扩展性
2. **CDN集成** - 添加静态资源CDN以提升加载速度
3. **数据库优化** - 实施数据库连接池和查询优化
4. **容器化部署** - 完善Docker配置和Kubernetes部署方案

### 下一步发展方向
1. **移动端适配** - 开发移动应用版本
2. **多语言支持** - 扩展国际化功能
3. **社交功能** - 添加分享和协作功能
4. **高级分析** - 提供更深入的学习行为分析

Sources:
- [package.json](package.json)
- [src/app/layout.tsx](src/app/layout.tsx)
- [src/lib/auth.ts](src/lib/auth.ts)
- [src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts](src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts)
- [src/components/AuthGuard.tsx](src/components/AuthGuard.tsx)
- [prisma/schema.prisma](prisma/schema.prisma)
- [src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts](src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts)
- [src/components/ui/button.tsx](src/components/ui/button.tsx)
- [src/app/page.tsx](src/app/page.tsx)
- [middleware.ts](middleware.ts)
- [next.config.ts](next.config.ts)

</blog>
